title: Sundha Mata Temple
tagline: Sundha Mata Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Sundha Mata temple is a nearly 900-year-old temple of Mother goddess Chamunda situated on a hilltop called Sundha, located at longitude 72.367°E and latitude 24.833°N, in Jalore Di
overview.description: Sundha Mata temple is a nearly 900-year-old temple of Mother goddess Chamunda situated on a hilltop called Sundha, located at longitude 72.367°E and latitude 24.833°N, in Jalore District of Rajasthan, India. It is 64 km (40 mi) from Mount Abu and 20 km (12 mi) from the town of Bhinmal.

topPlaces.name: Sundha Mata conservation reserve
topPlaces.description: Sundhamata Conservation Reserve is a protected area in the Aravalli Hills of western Rajasthan, India. It was notified on 25 November 2008 under Government of Rajasthan Order P.3(22)/Van/2008 to safeguard sloth bears (Melursus ursinus) and associated wildlife.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Jaswantpura
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Jaswantpura (जवाहर नवोदय विद्यालय, जसवन्तपुरा) is located near the village Jaswantpura in the Bhinmal tehsil of the Jalore district. This school is residence school and all facilities to the students is free of cost.

items.note: Sundhamata Conservation Reserve is a protected area in the Aravalli Hills of western Rajasthan, India. It was notified on 25 November 2008 under Government of Rajasthan Order P.3(22)/Van/2008 to safeguard sloth bears (Melursus ursinus) and associated wildlife.

Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Jaswantpura (जवाहर नवोदय विद्यालय, जसवन्तपुरा) is located near the village Jaswantpura in the Bhinmal tehsil of the Jalore district. This school is residence school and all facilities to the students is free of cost.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sundha Mata Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sundha Mata Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sundha Mata Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharana Pratap Airport, Udaipur (156 km) and the nearest railway station is Udaipur City (137 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sundha Mata Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sundha Mata Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sundha Mata Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sundha Mata Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sundha Mata Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sundha Mata conservation reserve, Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Jaswantpura.
